commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens exec allowlist handling for shell-wrapper inline payloads, adds cmd and PowerShell inline flag parsing, and expands parser, display, and allowlist regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main still has a wrapper allowlist path that can match the wrapper before payload fallback, and the PR head's wildcard and PowerShell prefix regressions are visible in source. No real-runtime after-fix proof is present because the PR body says it was not run.
